tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
    edit "Attacker-C2"
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall service custom
    edit "DNS-8853"
        set udp-portrange 8853
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "DENY-DNS-Exfil-8853"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Attacker-C2"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "Attacker-C2"
new entry 'Attacker-C2' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (Attacker-C2) #         set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.25 5

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (Attacker-C2) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall service custom

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) #     edit "DNS-8853"
new entry 'DNS-8853' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-8853) #         set udp-portrange 8853

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-8853) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set name "DENY-DNS-Exfil-8853"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstaddr "Attacker-C2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set service "DNS-8853"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-External-DNS"
        set uuid 5d16e8fc-32a9-51f1-b271-54ee40306734
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-UDP-TCP"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 4
        set name "DENY-DNS-Exfil-Any-Port"
        set uuid 673289c2-32a9-51f1-0085-da19de70bb12
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-ALL-PORTS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 100
set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 3
        set name "ALLOW-LAN-DNS-to-Resolver"
        set uuid 5d254fdc-32a9-51f1-7c40-3506e47aa6c9
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Internal-DNS-Resolver"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-UDP-TCP"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 5
set name "DENY-DNS-Exfil-8853"
        set uuid 6e4a47f4-32a9-51f1-4865-d61a6ee5a153
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Attacker-C2"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    move 5 before 100
    move 4 before 5
    move 2 before 4
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 5 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 4 before 5

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 2 before 4

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2

        set srcaddr "all"

        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Attacker-C2"

        set dstaddr "Internal-DNS-Resolver"
